name: light brown sugar
notes: Assumes packed cup measurement. Slightly lower molasses content than dark brown sugar.

name: dark brown sugar
notes: Assumes packed cup measurement. Higher molasses content than light brown sugar.

name: flaky sea salt
notes: Low-density finishing salt (e.g., Maldon style). Volume measurements are highly variable due to flake structure.

name: semi-sweet chocolate
notes: Assumes chip or chunk form measured by cup. Density may vary slightly for bars vs chips.

name: fine sea salt
notes: Fine grain sea salt. Slightly less dense than table salt but significantly denser than kosher or flaky salt.

name: cilantro (chopped)
notes: Fresh herb; cost varies a lot by bunch size.

name: parsley (chopped)
notes: Fresh herb; cost varies a lot by bunch size.

name: basil (chopped)
notes: Fresh herb; cost varies a lot by bunch size.

name: mint (chopped)
notes: Fresh herb; cost varies a lot by bunch size.

name: dill (chopped)
notes: Fresh herb; cost varies a lot by bunch size.

name: egg white (liquid)
notes: Unit-based ingredient; prefer grams_per_unit if you model it.

name: egg yolk
notes: Unit-based ingredient; prefer grams_per_unit if you model it.
